rules.name: Yes_Need_to_show_loading_screen
rules.label: Yes, Need to show loading screen

decisions.description: If the Opp is already closed, the User should not update the Opp.
decisions.name: Opp_already_Closed
decisions.label: Opp already Closed

decisions.description: MIS-7131 Closed lost flow new design
decisions.name: Opp_Type
decisions.label: Opp Type

decisions.description: MIS-7131 - New Closed lost for renewal type
decisions.name: Other_Competitor_Validation
decisions.label: Other Competitor Validation

decisions.description: In case the User Choose "Other" in Competitor Product, we make sure the "Other Competitor" is NOT blank MIS-7131 - New Closed lost for renewal type
decisions.name: Other_Competitor_Validation_2
decisions.label: Other Competitor Validation2

decisions.description: Check if we found related "SE"/"CSA" Requests
decisions.name: Related_Requests
decisions.label: Related Requests

decisions.description: MIS-7131 - New Closed lost for renewal type
decisions.name: Update_Opportunity_By_Type
decisions.label: Update Opportunity By Type

decisions.description: Checks if the User who started the Flow is the Account Owner. If no, we launch a Sub Flow with System permissions to create the follow up task.
decisions.name: User_is_the_Account_Owner
decisions.label: User is the Account Owner?

Flow.description: MIS-8264 - Churn Alert Revamp MIS-8118 - Added UpdatedByNextStage to New Sale/Upsell stage update Fixed renewal closed lost probability bug MIS-7416 MIS 7517 - Removed usage of Input_Text_Var variable in the Add Product Flow MIS-7656 Validate products were selected upon opp closing MIS-7365 - Added Acquired Company MIS-7404 Add fault paths to opportunity flows MIS-7289 - Fixed solution gap picklist value 28APR2025 - Added Product Tracking flow 29APR2025 - Removed old Product Tracking validation

formulas.description: Help Formula Var to make sure the User fill in "Other Competitors" when choosing "Other" in "Competitor Product"
formulas.name: For_Choosing_Other_Calc

formulas.description: In case there is already a value populated in the "Will the Opp be relevant again" field before clicking the "Lost Opp" button it will pre-populate in the screen Flow.
formulas.name: For_Opp_Will_be_Relevant_Default

formulas.description: Convert the "Opp will be relevant" picklist value to a number. This way we can use it to set the follow up task due date
formulas.name: For_Opp_Will_be_Relevant_Help

formulas.description: In case there is already a value populated in the "Primary Use Case" field before clicking the "Lost Opp" button it will pre-populate in the screen Flow.
formulas.name: For_Primary_Use_Case_Default

formulas.description: Make sure the User chooses at least 1 Product (checkbox) for Opps that were greater than 25%.
formulas.name: For_Product_Tracking_Validation
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Upsell')) && {!Get_Opportunity.Probability} >25 && {!Get_Opportunity.DMI__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Advisory_Services__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Shopper__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.DRI__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.II__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.API__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Data_Feeds__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Admetricks__c} = FALSE && {!Get_Opportunity.X42matters__c}= FALSE && {!Get_Opportunity.SI__c} = false, TRUE,FALSE)

formulas.description: Product Tracking Validation for Upsell Opps. In Upsell the User can also choose "App Intel" or "Other".
formulas.name: For_Product_Tracking_Validation_Upsell
formulas.expression: IF( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Opportunity.Type},'Upsell') && {!Get_Opportunity.Probability} >25 && {!Get_Opportunity.DMI__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Advisory_Services__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Shopper__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.DRI__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.II__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Data_Feeds__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.SI__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.API__c} = false && {!Get_Opportunity.Admetricks__c} = FALSE && {!Get_Opportunity.X42matters__c}= FALSE && {!Get_Opportunity.Other_Product__c} = false, TRUE,FALSE)

Flow.label: Opportunity Close Lost

value.stringValue: Previously lost Opp is relevant again!

recordLookups.name: Acquired_Get_Product_Tracking_From_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Acquired - Get Product Tracking From Opportunity

recordLookups.description: Get the related Account of the Opp
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Get the Opp Record that the User started the Flow from
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity

recordLookups.description: Pull CSA/SE open Request related to the Opportunity
recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Related Request

recordUpdates.description: Update all the fields on the according to the Sales Lost Screen
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity

fields.name: Acquired_Company_Tracking_Validation_Message
fields.fieldText: You must select at least 1 Product to continue

screens.name: Acquired_Success_Screen_for_Closed_Lost
screens.label: Acquired Success Screen for Closed Lost

value.stringValue: AI might have identified product gaps, churn drivers, and undelivered use cases. Please review and refine the insights as needed, then click 'Next' to proceed
Please do not leave this screen, otherwise the responses will not be saved

fields.name: Opp_Closed
fields.fieldText: Opportunity already {!Get_Opportunity.StageName}. Please reach out to Sales Operations for further assistance.

screens.description: Closed Lost Screen for "Partnership" RT Opp
screens.name: Partnership_Closed_Lost
screens.label: Partnership Closed Lost

fields.name: Opp_Details_Partnership
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: {!Get_Opportunity.Type} Cycle: {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle__c} Orig. Renewal Date: {!Get_Opportunity.Original_Renewal_Date__c}

fields.name: Simulator_Text_Partnership
fields.fieldText: New! use this Simulator to provide a complete Closed Lost Reason.

fields.name: Product_Tracking_Message
fields.fieldText: Please add all relevant products to the opportunity.

fields.name: Tracking_Validation_Message
fields.fieldText: You must select at least 1 Product to continue

fields.name: Why_did_the_client_replace_us_with_this_competitor
fields.fieldText: Why did the client replace us with this competitor?

rightValue.stringValue: Will replace SW with a competitor

fields.name: Have_we_met_the_customer_face_to_face
fields.fieldText: Have we met the customer face-to-face?

fields.name: Was_a_C_level_executive_involved_in_this_deal_If_so_who
fields.fieldText: Was a C-level executive involved in this deal? If so, who?

fields.name: When_was_the_last_time_we_provided_training_for_the_customer
fields.fieldText: When was the last time we provided training for the customer?

fields.name: Did_we_offer_a_cheaper_solution_discount
fields.fieldText: Did we offer a cheaper solution/discount

fields.name: Will_the_Opp_be_relevant_again_If_so_when_renewal
fields.fieldText: Will the Opp be relevant again? If so, when?

fields.name: What_are_the_key_takeaways_from_this_loss_and_what_could_have_been_done_differen
fields.fieldText: What are the key takeaways from this loss, and what could have been done differently?

fields.name: What_is_the_plan_to_bring_this_client_back
fields.fieldText: What is the plan to bring this client back?

fields.name: Opportunity_Details
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity Details

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: {!Get_Opportunity.Type} Cycle: {!Get_Opportunity.Cycle__c} Orig. Renewal Date: {!Get_Opportunity.Original_Renewal_Date__c}

fields.name: Simulator_Text
fields.fieldText: New! use this Simulator to provide a complete Closed Lost Reason.

fields.name: What_is_the_missing_Data_Coverage_Sales
fields.fieldText: What is the missing Data / Coverage?

fields.name: Will_the_Opp_be_relevant_again_If_so_when
fields.fieldText: Will the Opp be relevant again? If so, when?

fields.name: Were_There_Any_Recent_Multi_thread_Efforts_Done_Before_Churning
fields.fieldText: Were There Any Recent Multi-thread Efforts Done Before Churning?

fields.name: Missing_Data_or_Feature_from_Platform
fields.fieldText: Missing Data or Feature from Platform

fields.name: Please_specify_missing_coverage_or_feature
fields.fieldText: Please specify missing coverage or feature

fields.name: Please_specify_section_in_PRO_with_data_accuracy_issues
fields.fieldText: Please specify section in PRO with data accuracy issues

fields.name: Please_specify_the_country_that_had_issues
fields.fieldText: Please specify the country that had issues

screens.description: Shows the errors of the User's input in the "Sales Closed Lost" Screen page
screens.name: Validation_Error
screens.label: Validation Error

fields.name: First_closed_reason_error
fields.fieldText: Please select make sure the "First close reason" is not BLANK!

fields.name: Other_Competitor_Error
fields.fieldText: Please add "Other Competitors" only when choosing "Other" in Competitor Product.

fields.name: Choosing_Other_Error
fields.fieldText: When choosing "Other" in "Competitor Product", please make sure "Other Competitors" is not BLANK!

value.stringValue: Value - Partner saw no value in the partnership
Client Gap - Client did not agree to Legal terms
Client Gap - Customer refused annual price increase
Client Gap - Getting data from SW competitor
Client Gap - Receiving data from Agency/Third Party
Client Gap - SimilarWeb chose not to sell or renew (Frenemy, Competitor)
Client Gap - Client did not agree to Annual payment
Internal - Merged with/rolled into another opp/account
Relationship - No need for upsell offering
Relationship - No relationship with decision making authority
Relationship - Not the right time for the customer (they were interested)
Relationship - We could not reach the decision maker
Relationship - We started the renewal process too late
Relationship - We tried selling to the wrong department
Relationship - Working with few/wrong teams for company�s use case(s)
Solution Gap - Client opted for a 'no touch' offering (please select a second reason)
Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case
Solution Gap - Pricing of upsell offering was too high
Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case
Solution Gap - Removal of Popular Pages
Timing - Partner said it might fit them later
